summary: The implementation successfully delivers all five requirements with high fidelity to the BuildRequest. The frontend features a visually striking landing page with coral/teal color scheme, geometric patterns, and asymmetric layouts. An interactive feature showcase with hover effects and smooth transitions is implemented. The backend provides a complete Motoko actor with CRUD operations for user-generated content. React Query integration enables seamless data fetching with proper loading/error states and immediate UI updates after mutations. The design system consistently applies the coral (#FF6B6B) and teal (#2D9CDB) color palette with modern Inter typography throughout all components.

hallucinated_features.description: Dark mode support with theme provider and color system
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest does not request dark mode or theme switching functionality. The implementation includes ThemeProvider, dark mode color variables in index.css, and theme toggle infrastructure.

hallucinated_features.description: Mobile responsive navigation with hamburger menu
hallucinated_features.reason: While responsive design is implicit in modern web development, the BuildRequest does not explicitly request mobile menu functionality. The non-goals explicitly exclude 'Mobile-specific native functionality'.

hallucinated_features.description: Social media attribution links in footer
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest does not request footer social links or external attribution. The Layout component includes X (Twitter) and GitHub icon links.
BuildRequest does not specify user feedback mechanisms beyond 'immediate visual feedback' for interactions. The implementation adds Sonner toast library for success/error notifications.

hallucinated_features.description: Statistics display section with metrics (10K+ users, 99.9% uptime, #1 platform)
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest does not request statistical data or metrics showcase. The landing page includes a stats section with specific numbers that were not requested.
